changes.reason: Activate a dormant pin-risk split as an attribution experiment while preserving every currently routed VALID_0DTE profile. This tests whether existing router logic can divert charm-wall/pin-risk states into a separate profile instead of pruning the profitable charm-pin and charm-wall parents.

Enable only the dormant charm_wall_pin_avoid_long concept. The current leader's largest hidden risk is charm/pin tail MAE, but broad static filters overlap protected fast extended-VWAP winners, so a router split is cleaner than another global veto nudge.

recommendation.expected_effect: This should reveal whether an existing dormant pin-avoid profile is reachable and whether it isolates charm/pin tail states without damaging the profitable charm_pin_pullback_long and charm_wall_breakaway_long edges. Promote only if combined charm-pin/charm-wall/pin-avoid PnL is retained, total net profit stays within 2% of the run_029 leader, protected fast winners are not cannibalized, and worst MAE improves or stays flat. Main risk is router cannibalization or no reachable sample.
recommendation.label: dormant-charm-wall-pin-avoid-split
recommendation.rationale: The leader is already strong, and the latest evidence argues against another broad entry filter: hidden MAE signatures retain only 79-84% PnL or leave worst MAE unchanged, while protected extended-VWAP winners are a real edge. The next highest-value config-only experiment from the strategist plan is a dormant router split for charm/pin attribution. This uses the concept activation exception as one logical strategy-profile family and avoids repeating failed 1DTE tightening, no-0DTE pruning, squeeze target compression, and global extended-VWAP veto broadening.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1261.5 across 34 VALID_0DTE trades but owns the global -513.4 MAE. charm_wall_breakaway_long contributes $985.6 from only 5 trades with high convexity. Static filters overlap 19 protected extended-VWAP winners worth $715.7, so a split is preferable to blunt pruning.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Dormant Charm Wall Pin-Avoid Router Split
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The dormant profile may be unreachable, or router precedence may divert clean charm-pin/charm-wall winners into a weaker profile and suppress net profit.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm-wall or pin-risk state currently routed into charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Combined charm-pin/charm-wall/pin-avoid PnL remains >=98% of the leader contribution, total net profit remains >=98% of run_029, protected fast-winner retention >=95%, and worst MAE improves or remains no worse than -513.4.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: The worst charm-pin tail required 80 minutes to recover, had ES-VWAP 26.69, negative VWAP acceleration, high pullback-from-high 9.25, and failed TP-before-MAE, while protected fast extended-VWAP winners resolve quickly with median hold 2.27 minutes and median MAE -15.3.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Path-aware logic can overfit a small number of delayed green trades unless validated against protected fast-winner timestamps and out-of-sample days.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension entries that fail to make early positive progress after entry.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners, total net profit >=98% of leader, and slow_12h remains 0.
